query: SELECT v.id, v.clienteId, v.placa, v.marca, v.modelo, v.kmAtual, c.nomeCompleto FROM 08_veiculos v LEFT JOIN 07_clientes c ON v.clienteId = c.id ORDER BY v.id DESC LIMIT 10;
